prompts.narration_snippet: When you chronically override your own needs
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. The small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen reaches down and presses a large red 'OVERRIDE' button on its own chest panel, like overriding safety systems. Alarms immediately begin flashing inside the character—red lights blink, sirens sound (rendered as visible shock waves). The character's transparent body shows internal systems going haywire. The character's expression shows the moment of deliberately ignoring its own boundaries. The background shifts to warning tones. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. Inside the character, a tally board appears with hash marks accumulating. Each tally represents an override, a boundary crossed, a need ignored. The tallies grow higher and higher. The board itself is rendered in stark black and white, emphasizing the clinical accounting. The message is clear: the body records every transgression. The background darkens as the tally increases. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: Constant people-pleasing floods your system with cortisol
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A dam inside the character breaks. A massive flood of glowing orange cortisol liquid pours through the character's body like a destructive torrent. The liquid is rendered as a dangerous, uncontrolled force. The character's body is overwhelmed and submerged by the stress hormone flood. Internal organs and systems are battered by the wave. The color palette is fiery orange and hot red, emphasizing the intensity. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A molecular structure of cortisol is visualized as angry, spiky orange crystals bouncing chaotically through the character's bloodstream. The crystals are sharp and aggressive, damaging as they move. They crash against cell walls and internal structures. The microscopic level of stress is rendered as visible and threatening. The background is rendered as the interior of the body—vessels, cells, and tissues damaged by the hormone cascade. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: Over time, this leads to burnout
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. The small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen's inner light progressively dims across a timeline. The character's vibrant colors fade from bright, vivid hues to grey and brown tones. Cracks appear on the character's surface like burnt, charred ceramic. The character's massive, teal-green crystalline eyes lose their starry sparkle and become dim and lifeless. The progressive deterioration is heartbreaking. The background shifts from warm to cold tones. no text

The character's body language shows constant tension. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes dart nervously back and forth. Tension lines and motion marks surround the character. prompts.narration_snippet: You become exhausted not from doing too much
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A to-do list is visualized as stacked building blocks, piled higher and higher. However, the pile is not impossibly tall—it's reasonable and manageable in volume. The stack represents a normal amount of tasks. The fatigue the character experiences is not proportional to the workload. The character stands before the reasonable stack, looking utterly drained beyond what the task list would suggest. The disproportion between effort and exhaustion is the focal point. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: but from never doing what you actually want
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. Inside the character's chest, a locked treasure chest glows with golden light, filled with dreams, desires, and personal goals. The chest is closed and sealed. The character glances at it longingly, knowing the treasure inside could restore vitality. However, the character is locked out from accessing its own dreams. The contrast between the glowing potential inside and the character's empty, drained external state is striking. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A hall of mirrors appears, with multiple reflections showing the character from different angles. Each reflection shows the character smiling—but none of the smiles match or align with each other. Some smiles are forced, some are genuine-looking but false, some are exaggerated. All the reflected smiles are slightly different performances. The character walks through this hall, seeing different versions of its performed self everywhere. The fractured identity is haunting. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: is that it doesn't even work

prompts.narration_snippet: is approval for a performance, not for you
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. Where the character stood, a theatrical mask now hovers in the air, glowing with stage lights. The mask displays a brilliant smile and cheerful expression. Behind the mask, the real character is invisible—there is no one there. The approval and applause are directed at the mask, not the person beneath. The mask is the only thing visible. The real character has been completely hidden behind the performance. no text

The character looks sad and lonely but unwavering in its truth. This is the authentic self that has been buried. no text
